component.name: Rubric
component.summary: Worship service planning with RCL integration

description.p: Rubric is a GNOME-native worship service planning tool for United Church of Canada ministry. Plan service orders, look up RCL readings, find hymns, fetch Bible passages, and export polished bulletins as HTML or PDF. PDF export uses the bundled Typst typesetter — no external tools required.

ul.li: Revised Common Lectionary readings, liturgical colour, and per-Proper hymn suggestions
Hymn lookup from Voices United, More Voices, and Let Us Sing via Hymnary.org
Bible passage viewer (WEB, KJV, ASV, ESV) with one-click scripture insertion
Rich text and raw Typst editing per service element
Live PDF bulletin preview with bundled Typst compiler
HTML bulletin export — print to PDF directly from your browser
Service Planner to browse and open all your saved services
GitHub sync to back up and share services across machines
Snippets library and responsive reading builder

description.p: Flatpak fix: git sync (commit, push, pull) now works inside the sandbox via flatpak-spawn --host.
Flatpak fix: the bundled Typst binary was not being found, silently breaking all PDF preview and export. Now installed to /app/bin where it is on PATH.

Bulletin and Manuscript preview toggle. Delete key no longer removes service elements while typing in a text field. Preview scroll position preserved across recompiles. Typst markup (italic, bold, headings) in element notes now renders correctly. Heading hierarchy fixed: = section, == element with rule, === sub-heading.

Phase 4 — Polish and Packaging. Typst syntax highlighting in the element editor (GtkSourceView). Structured error parsing for compilation failures. In-app Typst template editor in Preferences → Typst Files with Reset to default. Bundled typst binary included in deb and rpm packages. Documentation updated throughout.

Sidebar starts fully visible. Autosave restore dialog now appears after the changelog, not over it. Hymn downloads continue in the background if you close the wizard; toast notification when done. Hymn scraping now uses og:title for reliability.
Compact view now actually reduces row height. Fixes the CSS that was adding padding to divider rows and having no effect on service-item rows.
Native .deb (Debian/Ubuntu) and .rpm (openSUSE/Fedora) packages. Build scripts added: build-deb.sh and build-rpm.sh.
Service Planner, GitHub sync, redo support, translation selector (WEB/KJV/ASV/ESV), and HTML bulletin export.
Lectionary year tracker, per-Proper hymn suggestions, inline Hymnary preview, welcome dialog, and app renamed to Rubric.
Scripture layout improvements, PDF compile button, toast notifications, menu reorganisation.
